title: Retired Python Studio Route Shell Contract
summary: Removed the obsolete Python route-specific shell helper, narrowed active Studio shell types to JavaScript plus external peer links, updated fallback/test fixtures, and refreshed runtime and JavaScript inventory docs after the Studio app shell migration.
effect: The Local Studio route boundary is now explicit: Python serves the home page, generic JavaScript app bootstrap, runtime config, and backend APIs, while browser JavaScript owns all configured Studio-local route shells and body markup.
